

# Needed Libraries

```{r}
# Data Manipulation & Core Utilities
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(forcats)
library(readr)
library(utils)
library(rlang)

# Data Visualization & Plotting
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)
library(plotly)
library(scales)

# Geospatial Analysis & Point Processes
library(sf)
library(lwgeom)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
library(spatgeom)  # Core library for RAUC and alpha-shape calculations

# Numerical Computing & Mathematics
library(pracma)
library(RSDA)      # Interval-valued data analysis
library(parallel)  # Multi-core processing

# Machine Learning & Datasets
library(randomForest)
library(ISLR)      # Academic datasets (e.g., Boston Housing)
```

# Ejemplo.

```{r}
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}
rauc.valuesk <- function(datos, res, target){
  scale_minmax <- function(x){
    (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
  }
  datos <- as.data.frame(lapply(datos, scale_minmax))
  df <- res$results[[1]]$geom_indices
  df <- df[order(df$alpha), ]
  df <- df[!duplicated(df$alpha), ]
  vars <- "embedding"
  rauc_values <- numeric(1)
  names(rauc_values) <- vars
  plots <- list()
  make_step <- function(x, y){
    data.frame(
      x = rep(x, each = 2)[-1],
      y = rep(y, each = 2)[-length(y)*2 + 1]
    )
  }
  n <- nrow(datos)
  alpha <- c(0, df$alpha)
  phi   <- c(1, df$geom_corr)
  step_df <- make_step(alpha, phi)
  auc_phi <- trapz(step_df$x, step_df$y)
  csr <- exp(-n * pi * alpha^2)
  csr[1] <- 1
  alpha_max <- max(alpha)
  auc_csr <- (1 / (2 * sqrt(n))) * erf(sqrt(n * pi) * alpha_max)
  rauc <- auc_csr / auc_phi
  rauc_values[1] <- rauc
  csr_df <- data.frame(alpha = alpha, y = csr, ymin = 0)
  step_df$ymin <- 0
  p1 <- ggplot(datos, aes_string(x = names(datos)[1], y = target)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
    labs(x = "PC1 / X", y = target) +
    theme_minimal()
  p2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = step_df,
                aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_step(data = step_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(data = csr_df,
                aes(x = alpha, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "blue", alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_line(data = csr_df,
              aes(x = alpha, y = y),
              color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(
      x = expression(alpha),
      y = expression(L(alpha)),
      title = "Geometric Embedding RAUC"
    ) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_minimal()

  plots[[1]] <- p1 + p2

  return(list(
    rauc = rauc_values,
    plots = plots
  ))
}
compute_alpha_shape.pca <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  library(sf)
  library(lwgeom)

  pts <- st_as_sf(coords, coords = c("PC1", "PC2"))

  tri <- st_triangulate(st_union(pts))

  tri <- st_collection_extract(tri, "POLYGON")
  tri <- st_as_sf(tri)

  lines <- st_cast(tri, "LINESTRING")
  lines_split <- st_split(lines, pts)

  max_length <- sapply(lines_split, function(x){
    max(st_length(st_cast(st_sfc(x))))
  })

  triangles <- st_sf(
    geometry = tri$geometry,
    max_length = as.numeric(max_length),
    alpha = as.numeric(max_length) / 2
  )

  alpha_tri <- triangles[triangles$max_length <= 2 * alpha_value, ]

  shape_union <- st_union(alpha_tri)

  return(list(
    shape = shape_union,
    triangles = triangles,
    alpha_tri = alpha_tri
  ))
}
plot_alpha_shape.pca <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  res <- compute_alpha_shape.pca(coords, alpha_value)

  ggplot() +

    geom_sf(data = res$triangles,
            fill = NA,
            color = "gray80",
            linewidth = 0.3) +

    geom_sf(data = res$alpha_tri,
            fill = "lightblue",
            color = "blue",
            alpha = 0.5) +

    geom_sf(data = res$shape,
            fill = NA,
            color = "darkblue",
            linewidth = 1.2) +

    geom_point(data = coords,
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2),
               size = 1) +

labs(
  title = bquote(alpha == .(round(alpha_value, 3))),
  x = "PCA1",
  y = "PCA2"
)

    theme_minimal()
}
plot_multiple_alpha.pca <- function(coords, alpha_values){

  plots <- lapply(alpha_values, function(a){
    plot_alpha_shape(coords, a)
  })

  return(plots)
}
plot_alpha_shape.iris <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  shape <- compute_alpha_shape(coords, alpha_value)

  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = shape, fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_point(data = coords,
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Species),
               size = 1.8) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Alpha-shape (alpha =", round(alpha_value, 3), ")"),
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}
compute_alpha_shape.umap <- function(coords, alpha_value){

  pts <- st_as_sf(coords, coords = c("UMAP1", "UMAP2"))

  tri <- st_triangulate(st_union(pts))
  tri <- st_collection_extract(st_sfc(tri), "POLYGON")

  lines <- st_cast(tri, "LINESTRING")
  lines_split <- st_split(lines, pts)

  max_length <- sapply(lines_split, function(x){
    max(st_length(st_cast(st_sfc(x))))
  })

  triangles <- st_sf(
    geometry = tri,
    max_length = as.numeric(max_length),
    alpha = as.numeric(max_length) / 2
  )

  alpha_tri <- triangles[triangles$max_length <= 2 * alpha_value, ]

  shape_union <- st_union(alpha_tri)

  return(shape_union)
}
plot_alpha_shape.umap <- function(coords, alpha_value){
  shape <- compute_alpha_shape.umap(coords, alpha_value)
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = shape, fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_point(data = coords, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2), size = 1) +
    labs(x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()}
rauc.valuesk2 <- function(datos, res, target){

  datos_num <- datos[, sapply(datos, is.numeric)]

  library(pracma)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)

  df <- res$results[[1]]$geom_indices
  df <- df[order(df$alpha), ]
  df <- df[!duplicated(df$alpha), ]

  vars <- "embedding"
  rauc_values <- numeric(1)
  names(rauc_values) <- vars
  plots <- list()

  make_step <- function(x, y){
    data.frame(
      x = rep(x, each = 2)[-1],
      y = rep(y, each = 2)[-length(y)*2 + 1]
    )
  }

  n <- nrow(datos_num)
  alpha <- c(0, df$alpha)
  phi   <- c(1, df$geom_corr)
  step_df <- make_step(alpha, phi)
  auc_phi <- trapz(step_df$x, step_df$y)

  csr <- exp(-n * pi * alpha^2)
  csr[1] <- 1
  alpha_max <- max(alpha)
  auc_csr <- (1 / (2 * sqrt(n))) * erf(sqrt(n * pi) * alpha_max)

  rauc <- auc_csr / auc_phi
  rauc_values[1] <- rauc

  csr_df <- data.frame(alpha = alpha, y = csr, ymin = 0)
  step_df$ymin <- 0

p1 <- ggplot(datos, aes(x = F1, y = F2, fill = as.factor(Number))) +
    geom_point(shape = 21, color = "black", size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    labs(x = "F1", y = "F2", fill = "Digit") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")

  p2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = step_df,
                aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_step(data = step_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(data = csr_df,
                aes(x = alpha, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "blue", alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_line(data = csr_df,
              aes(x = alpha, y = y),
              color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(
      x = expression(alpha),
      y = expression(f(alpha))
    ) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

  plots[[1]] <- p1 + p2

  return(list(
    rauc = rauc_values,
    plots = plots
  ))
}
```

##pca dataset penguins

```{r}
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
data <- penguins
penguins_num <- penguins[, sapply(penguins, is.numeric)]
str(penguins_num)
head(penguins_num)
colSums(is.na(penguins_num))
penguins_num <- na.omit(penguins_num)
res.pca <- PCA(penguins_num, scale.unit = TRUE, graph = FALSE)
fviz_pca_ind(res.pca,
             geom = "point",
             label = "none")
coord <- as.data.frame(res.pca$ind$coord[, 1:2])
colnames(coord) <- c("PC1", "PC2")
coord <- as.data.frame(lapply(coord, minmax))
pred <- coords$PC2# Variable a predecir
res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$PC1, scale =F)
res2 <-rauc.valuesk(coord, res, pred)
res2$plots
plot_alpha_shape.pca(coords, alpha_value = 1)
```

##umap dataset penguins

```{r}
library(umap)
library(ggplot2)
data <- penguins
penguins_num <- penguins[, sapply(penguins, is.numeric)]
penguins_num <- na.omit(penguins_num)
umap_res <- umap(penguins_num)
coord <- as.data.frame(umap_res$layout)
colnames(coord) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}
coord <- as.data.frame(lapply(coord, minmax))

ggplot(coord, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()

pred <- coord$UMAP2   
res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$UMAP1, scale = FALSE)

res2 <- rauc.valuesk(coord, res, pred)

res2$plots

plot_alpha_shape.umap(coord, alpha_value = 0.2)
```


##pca dataset iris

```{r}
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)

data(iris)

iris_num <- iris[, sapply(iris, is.numeric)]

res.pca <- PCA(iris_num, scale.unit = TRUE, graph = FALSE)

coord <- as.data.frame(res.pca$ind$coord[, 1:2])
colnames(coord) <- c("PC1", "PC2")

coord$Species <- iris$Species

minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

coord[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

ggplot(coord, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Species)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA - Iris (coloreado por especie)")

pred <- coord$PC2

res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$PC1, scale = FALSE)

res1 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord, res, pred)

res1$plots

plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0)
gra1 <- plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.1)
plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.2)
plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.3)
plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, max(res$results[[1]]$geom_indices$alpha))
```

##umap dataset iris

```{r}
library(umap)
library(ggplot2)

data(iris)

iris_num <- iris[, sapply(iris, is.numeric)]

umap_res <- umap(iris_num)

coord <- as.data.frame(umap_res$layout)
colnames(coord) <- c("PC1", "PC2")  

coord$Species <- iris$Species

minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

coord[, c("PC1","PC2")] <- lapply(coord[, c("PC1","PC2")], minmax)

ggplot(coord, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Species)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "UMAP - Iris (coloreado por especie)")

pred <- coord$PC2

res <- spatgeom(y = pred, x = coord$PC1, scale = FALSE)

res2 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord, res, pred)

res2$plots

gra2 <- plot_alpha_shape.iris(coord, alpha_value = 0.45)
```

```{r}
gra3 <-res1$plots[[1]]
gra4 <-res2$plots[[1]]
gra1
gra2
gra3
gra4

p <- (gra3 | gra4) /
     (gra1 | gra2)

pdf("spg.pdf", width = 12, height = 10)
print(p)
dev.off()
```


# Experimento 5 iris

```{r}
rauc.valuesk2 <- function(datos, res, target){

  datos_num <- datos[, sapply(datos, is.numeric)]

  library(pracma)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)

  df <- res$results[[1]]$geom_indices
  df <- df[order(df$alpha), ]
  df <- df[!duplicated(df$alpha), ]

  vars <- "embedding"
  rauc_values <- numeric(1)
  names(rauc_values) <- vars
  plots <- list()

  make_step <- function(x, y){
    data.frame(
      x = rep(x, each = 2)[-1],
      y = rep(y, each = 2)[-length(y)*2 + 1]
    )
  }

  n <- nrow(datos_num)
  alpha <- c(0, df$alpha)
  phi   <- c(1, df$geom_corr)
  step_df <- make_step(alpha, phi)
  auc_phi <- trapz(step_df$x, step_df$y)

  csr <- exp(-n * pi * alpha^2)
  csr[1] <- 1
  alpha_max <- max(alpha)
  auc_csr <- (1 / (2 * sqrt(n))) * erf(sqrt(n * pi) * alpha_max)

  rauc <- auc_csr / auc_phi
  rauc_values[1] <- rauc

  csr_df <- data.frame(alpha = alpha, y = csr, ymin = 0)
  step_df$ymin <- 0

  p1 <- ggplot(datos, aes(x = F1, y = F2, fill = as.factor(.data[[target]]))) +
    geom_point(shape = 21, color = "black", size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    labs(x = "F1", y = "F2", fill = target) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")

  p2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = step_df,
                aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_step(data = step_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(data = csr_df,
                aes(x = alpha, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "blue", alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_line(data = csr_df,
              aes(x = alpha, y = y),
              color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(
      x = expression(alpha),
      y = expression(f(alpha))
    ) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

  plots[[1]] <- p1 + p2

  return(list(
    rauc = rauc_values,
    plots = plots
  ))
}
```

```{r}

library(umap)
library(ggplot2)
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

data(iris)
iris_num <- iris[, sapply(iris, is.numeric)]


config1 <- umap.defaults
config1$metric <- "euclidean"
config1$n_neighbors <- 5
model1 <- umap(iris_num, config = config1)

config2 <- umap.defaults
config2$metric <- "euclidean"
config2$n_neighbors <- 15
model2 <- umap(iris_num, config = config2)

config3 <- umap.defaults
config3$metric <- "euclidean"
config3$n_neighbors <- 50
model3 <- umap(iris_num, config = config3)

config4 <- umap.defaults
config4$metric <- "manhattan"
config4$n_neighbors <- 5
model4 <- umap(iris_num, config = config4)

config5 <- umap.defaults
config5$metric <- "manhattan"
config5$n_neighbors <- 15
model5 <- umap(iris_num, config = config5)

config6 <- umap.defaults
config6$metric <- "manhattan"
config6$n_neighbors <- 50
model6 <- umap(iris_num, config = config6)

config7 <- umap.defaults
config7$metric <- "cosine"
config7$n_neighbors <- 5
model7 <- umap(iris_num, config = config7)

config8 <- umap.defaults
config8$metric <- "cosine"
config8$n_neighbors <- 15
model8 <- umap(iris_num, config = config8)

config9 <- umap.defaults
config9$metric <- "cosine"
config9$n_neighbors <- 50
model9 <- umap(iris_num, config = config9)

coord1 <- as.data.frame(model1$layout)
colnames(coord1) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord1$Species <- iris$Species
coord1[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord1[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord2 <- as.data.frame(model2$layout)
colnames(coord2) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord2$Species <- iris$Species
coord2[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord2[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord3 <- as.data.frame(model3$layout)
colnames(coord3) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord3$Species <- iris$Species
coord3[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord3[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord4 <- as.data.frame(model4$layout)
colnames(coord4) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord4$Species <- iris$Species
coord4[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord4[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord5 <- as.data.frame(model5$layout)
colnames(coord5) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord5$Species <- iris$Species
coord5[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord5[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord6 <- as.data.frame(model6$layout)
colnames(coord6) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord6$Species <- iris$Species
coord6[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord6[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord7 <- as.data.frame(model7$layout)
colnames(coord7) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord7$Species <- iris$Species
coord7[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord7[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord8 <- as.data.frame(model8$layout)
colnames(coord8) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord8$Species <- iris$Species
coord8[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord8[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord9 <- as.data.frame(model9$layout)
colnames(coord9) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord9$Species <- iris$Species
coord9[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord9[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

pred1 <- coord1$F2
res1 <- spatgeom(y = pred1, x = coord1$F1, scale = FALSE)
res11 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord1, res1, "Species")

pred2 <- coord2$F2
res2 <- spatgeom(y = pred2, x = coord2$F1, scale = FALSE)
res22 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord2, res2, "Species")

pred3 <- coord3$F2
res3 <- spatgeom(y = pred3, x = coord3$F1, scale = FALSE)
res33 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord3, res3, "Species")

pred4 <- coord4$F2
res4 <- spatgeom(y = pred4, x = coord4$F1, scale = FALSE)
res44 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord4, res4, "Species")

pred5 <- coord5$F2
res5 <- spatgeom(y = pred5, x = coord5$F1, scale = FALSE)
res55 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord5, res5, "Species")

pred6 <- coord6$F2
res6 <- spatgeom(y = pred6, x = coord6$F1, scale = FALSE)
res66 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord6, res6, "Species")

pred7 <- coord7$F2
res7 <- spatgeom(y = pred7, x = coord7$F1, scale = FALSE)
res77 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord7, res7, "Species")

pred8 <- coord8$F2
res8 <- spatgeom(y = pred8, x = coord8$F1, scale = FALSE)
res88 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord8, res8, "Species")

pred9 <- coord9$F2
res9 <- spatgeom(y = pred9, x = coord9$F1, scale = FALSE)
res99 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord9, res9, "Species")

a <- res11$rauc
b <- res22$rauc
c <- res33$rauc
d <- res44$rauc
e <- res55$rauc
f <- res66$rauc
g <- res77$rauc
h <- res88$rauc
i <- res99$rauc

raucs <- as.numeric(c(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i))

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)

rauc_num <- c(0.09530195, 0.08107391, 0.09908910, 0.10543085, 0.09525966 ,0.09173806, 0.12581752,0.08484428, 0.10431461)

df <- data.frame(
  variable = c(
    "Euclidean (5)",
    "Euclidean (15)",
    "Euclidean (50)",
    "Manhattan (5)",
    "Manhattan (15)",
    "Manhattan (50)",
    "Cosine (5)",
    "Cosine (15)",
    "Cosine (50)"
  ),
  rauc = raucs
)

df$variable <- fct_reorder(df$variable, df$rauc, .desc = TRUE)

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = variable, y = rauc)) +
  geom_col(fill = "lightblue",
           color = "black",
           width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "UMAP configurations (Metric, Neighbors)",
    y = "RAUC"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

p

ggsave("finald.pdf", plot = p, width = 8, height = 5)
``` 

```{r}
im1 <- res11$plots[[1]]
im2 <- res22$plots[[1]]
im3 <- res33$plots[[1]]
im4 <- res44$plots[[1]]
im5 <- res55$plots[[1]]
im6 <- res66$plots[[1]]
im7 <- res77$plots[[1]]
im8 <- res88$plots[[1]]
im9 <- res99$plots[[1]]

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

library(patchwork)

p <- (im1 | im2 | im3) /
     (im4 | im5 | im6) /
     (im7 | im8 | im9)

ggsave("umd.pdf", p, width = 17, height = 10)

```

# Experimento 6 facedata

```{r}
rauc.valuesk2 <- function(datos, res, target){

  datos_num <- datos[, sapply(datos, is.numeric)]

  library(pracma)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)

  df <- res$results[[1]]$geom_indices
  df <- df[order(df$alpha), ]
  df <- df[!duplicated(df$alpha), ]

  vars <- "embedding"
  rauc_values <- numeric(1)
  names(rauc_values) <- vars
  plots <- list()

  make_step <- function(x, y){
    data.frame(
      x = rep(x, each = 2)[-1],
      y = rep(y, each = 2)[-length(y)*2 + 1]
    )
  }

  n <- nrow(datos_num)
  alpha <- c(0, df$alpha)
  phi   <- c(1, df$geom_corr)
  step_df <- make_step(alpha, phi)
  auc_phi <- trapz(step_df$x, step_df$y)

  csr <- exp(-n * pi * alpha^2)
  csr[1] <- 1
  alpha_max <- max(alpha)
  auc_csr <- (1 / (2 * sqrt(n))) * erf(sqrt(n * pi) * alpha_max)

  rauc <- auc_csr / auc_phi
  rauc_values[1] <- rauc

  csr_df <- data.frame(alpha = alpha, y = csr, ymin = 0)
  step_df$ymin <- 0

p1 <- ggplot(datos, aes(x = F1, y = F2, fill = as.factor(Number))) +
    geom_point(shape = 21, color = "black", size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "F2", fill = "Digit") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")

  p2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = step_df,
                aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_step(data = step_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(data = csr_df,
                aes(x = alpha, ymin = ymin, ymax = y),
                fill = "blue", alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_line(data = csr_df,
              aes(x = alpha, y = y),
              color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(
      x = expression(alpha),
      y = expression(f(alpha))
    ) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

  plots[[1]] <- p1 + p2

  return(list(
    rauc = rauc_values,
    plots = plots
  ))
}
```

```{r}
library(umap)
library(ggplot2)
minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

data <- read.csv("tra.csv")
set.seed(123)     
data <- data[sample(nrow(data), 785), ]

config1 <- umap.defaults
config1$metric <- "euclidean"
config1$n_neighbors <- 5
model1 <- umap(data, config = config1)

config2 <- umap.defaults
config2$metric <- "euclidean"
config2$n_neighbors <- 15
model2 <- umap(data, config = config2)

config3 <- umap.defaults
config3$metric <- "euclidean"
config3$n_neighbors <- 50
model3 <- umap(data, config = config3)

config4 <- umap.defaults
config4$metric <- "manhattan"
config4$n_neighbors <- 5
model4 <- umap(data, config = config4)

config5 <- umap.defaults
config5$metric <- "manhattan"
config5$n_neighbors <- 15
model5 <- umap(data, config = config5)

config6 <- umap.defaults
config6$metric <- "manhattan"
config6$n_neighbors <- 50
model6 <- umap(data, config = config6)

config7 <- umap.defaults
config7$metric <- "cosine"
config7$n_neighbors <- 5
model7 <- umap(data, config = config7)

config8 <- umap.defaults
config8$metric <- "cosine"
config8$n_neighbors <- 15
model8 <- umap(data, config = config8)

config9 <- umap.defaults
config9$metric <- "cosine"
config9$n_neighbors <- 50
model9 <- umap(data, config = config9)
```

```{r}
coord1 <- as.data.frame(model1$layout)
colnames(coord1) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord1$Number <- data$label
coord1[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord1[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord2 <- as.data.frame(model2$layout)
colnames(coord2) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord2$Number <- data$label
coord2[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord2[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord3 <- as.data.frame(model3$layout)
colnames(coord3) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord3$Number <- data$label
coord3[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord3[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord4 <- as.data.frame(model4$layout)
colnames(coord4) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord4$Number <- data$label
coord4[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord4[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord5 <- as.data.frame(model5$layout)
colnames(coord5) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord5$Number <- data$label
coord5[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord5[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord6 <- as.data.frame(model6$layout)
colnames(coord6) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord6$Number <- data$label
coord6[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord6[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord7 <- as.data.frame(model7$layout)
colnames(coord7) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord7$Number <- data$label
coord7[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord7[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord8 <- as.data.frame(model8$layout)
colnames(coord8) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord8$Number <- data$label
coord8[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord8[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)

coord9 <- as.data.frame(model9$layout)
colnames(coord9) <- c("F1", "F2")  
coord9$Number <- data$label
coord9[, c("F1","F2")] <- lapply(coord9[, c("F1","F2")], minmax)
```

```{r}
#coord1 <- select(coord1, -Species)

pred1 <- coord1$F2
res1 <- spatgeom(y = pred1, x = coord1$F1, scale = FALSE)
res11 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord1, res1, pred1)

pred2 <- coord2$F2
res2 <- spatgeom(y = pred2, x = coord2$F1, scale = FALSE)
res22 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord2, res2, pred2)

pred3 <- coord3$F2
res3 <- spatgeom(y = pred3, x = coord3$F1, scale = FALSE)
res33 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord3, res3, pred3)


pred4 <- coord4$F2
res4 <- spatgeom(y = pred4, x = coord4$F1, scale = FALSE)
res44 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord4, res4, pred4)


pred5 <- coord5$F2
res5 <- spatgeom(y = pred5, x = coord5$F1, scale = FALSE)
res55 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord5, res5, pred5)

pred6 <- coord6$F2
res6 <- spatgeom(y = pred6, x = coord6$F1, scale = FALSE)
res66 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord6, res6, pred6)


pred7 <- coord7$F2
res7 <- spatgeom(y = pred7, x = coord7$F1, scale = FALSE)
res77 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord7, res7, pred7)


pred8 <- coord8$F2
res8 <- spatgeom(y = pred8, x = coord8$F1, scale = FALSE)
res88 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord8, res8, pred8)


pred9 <- coord9$F2
res9 <- spatgeom(y = pred9, x = coord9$F1, scale = FALSE)
res99 <- rauc.valuesk2(coord9, res9, pred9)

a <- res11$rauc
b <- res22$rauc
c <- res33$rauc
d <- res44$rauc
e <- res55$rauc
f <- res66$rauc
g <- res77$rauc
h <- res88$rauc
i <- res99$rauc

raucs <- as.numeric(c(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i))

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)

rauc_num <- c(0.09217526, 0.13318691, 0.14620859, 0.10477801, 0.09862461, 0.15196200, 0.06108807,0.08816641, 0.11184142)

df <- data.frame(
  variable = c(
    "Euclidean (5)",
    "Euclidean (15)",
    "Euclidean (50)",
    "Manhattan (5)",
    "Manhattan (15)",
    "Manhattan (50)",
    "Cosine (5)",
    "Cosine (15)",
    "Cosine (50)"
  ),
  rauc = raucs
)

df$variable <- fct_reorder(df$variable, df$rauc, .desc = TRUE)

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = variable, y = rauc)) +
  geom_col(fill = "lightblue",
           color = "black",
           width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "UMAP configurations (Metric, Neighbors)",
    y = "RAUC"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

p

ggsave("colors.pdf", plot = p, width = 8, height = 5)
``` 

```{r}
im1 <- res11$plots[[1]]
im2 <- res22$plots[[1]]
im3 <- res33$plots[[1]]
im4 <- res44$plots[[1]]
im5 <- res55$plots[[1]]
im6 <- res66$plots[[1]]
im7 <- res77$plots[[1]]
im8 <- res88$plots[[1]]
im9 <- res99$plots[[1]]

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

library(patchwork)

p <- (im1 | im2 | im3) /
     (im4 | im5 | im6) /
     (im7 | im8 | im9)

ggsave("colors2.pdf", p, width = 16, height = 10)

```
